creator: colin-ports@heliocat.net
text:
Created attachment 181659
Port update

Non-maintainer update for s6-rc

The pending updates for skalibs, execline, and s6 will cause a build-break in 
s6-rc. Additionally, there as been a great deal of refactoring and adjustments
since the original maintainer added the package.

Diff contains the following changes:
Makefile: Version bump, runtime dependency on s6-svscan, docs shuffling
distinfo: contents update
pkg-plist: file drift
files/: removed, patch no longer applicable

Notable changes between 0.0.2.1 and 0.2.0.0:
    s6-rc commands taking a lock on the live directory or the service database now fail instantly if the lock is already held. The new -b option makes them revert to the "block until the lock is released" behaviour.

As always, update notes can be found at:
http://www.skarnet.org/software/s6-rc/upgrade.html
